title: Global Risk Clocks
summary: Static speculative pressure scores for high-level risk lanes. These are not live counters, predictions, financial advice, medical advice, or claims of certainty.
homepageRule: Only clocks at 90 percent or above may surface on the homepage. Epstein alerts may surface only when active and before their expiry date.
evidenceRule: Use dated public signals only. Keep speculation labelled. Do not repeat the risk terminal across the page as if it is a live counter.

clocks.title: WWIII Escalation Clock
clocks.signals: Ukraine approved a new 40-day pressure campaign against Russian war-support facilities; Hormuz shipping has partially reopened but route risk and ceasefire fragility remain; Gaza, Iran, Lebanon, Red Sea, sanctions, and nuclear rhetoric stay active.

clocks.title: AI Breakout Clock
clocks.signals: U.S. pressure for frontier-model government review, national-security model access, autonomous agents, military AI, cyber misuse, labor displacement, and regulation gaps keep the lane high.

clocks.title: Surveillance State Clock
clocks.signals: Digital ID rollout, biometric verification, facial recognition, AI-model review pathways, platform control, censorship law, payment monitoring, and state-security integration remain the active signal set.

clocks.title: Financial Reset Clock
clocks.signals: Debt stress, energy-route risk, cyber disruption to banking rails, CBDC pilots, gold movement, bank fragility, and emergency central-bank language keep the pressure elevated.

clocks.title: CBDC Rollout Clock
clocks.signals: Central-bank pilots, digital ID pairing, programmable-money language, cross-border payment rails, wallet standards, and public/private identity infrastructure remain active.

clocks.title: Cyber Blackout Clock
clocks.signals: Iran reported card-banking disruption at three major lenders after cyberattacks; wider signals include ransomware, grid warnings, banking outages, state-backed cyber alerts, and telecom fragility.

clocks.title: Alien Disclosure Clock
clocks.signals: UAP hearings, whistleblower claims, NASA/DoD statements, anomalous-object reports, and scientific shifts remain watch-level rather than confirmed-disclosure signals.

clocks.title: Pandemic / Biosecurity Clock
clocks.signals: WHO alerts, bird flu, lab-leak arguments, emergency planning, contracts, and biosecurity exercises remain watch-level; no current site signal warrants an escalation label.

clocks.title: Civil Unrest Clock
clocks.signals: Elections, migration pressure, food and energy strain, policing escalation, speech controls, war protests, and emergency laws keep the civil-stability lane elevated.

clocks.title: Food System Stress Clock
clocks.signals: FAO/WFP warned acute hunger may worsen across 13 hotspots from June to November 2026; conflict, weather, aid funding, crop stress, water scarcity, and price shocks remain core signals.

clocks.title: Energy Shock Clock
clocks.signals: Hormuz crude shipments have rebounded after ceasefire movement, but traffic remains below normal and route risk persists; oil chokepoints, LNG stress, refinery attacks, sanctions, and grid strain remain active.

clocks.title: Machine Convergence
clocks.signals: Hidden composite index: AI-state integration, surveillance rails, cyber dependency, payment systems, war automation, biometric identity, and platform control. No public certainty claim.
